mapper.select: SELECT BOOK_ID AS bookId, TITLE AS title, AUTHOR AS author, PUBLISHER AS publisher, STATUS AS status FROM BOOK ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
SELECT BOOK_ID AS bookId, TITLE AS title, AUTHOR AS author, PUBLISHER AS publisher, STATUS AS status FROM BOOK WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOK (TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, STATUS) VALUES (#{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.select:
SELECT BOOK_ID AS bookId, TITLE AS title, AUTHOR AS author, PUBLISHER AS publisher, STATUS AS status FROM BOOK
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND AUTHOR LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND PUBLISHER LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
